sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49775" key="i)afe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰᾰφέτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἰός, ἀφίημι</etym>) <sense id="n49775.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">archer</tr_>, of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
